programmes.show_description: Rich, 17, goes flying after hitting a roadblock on his mountain bike. Can surgeons do enough to ensure he doesn't sustain lasting brain injury due to his open skull fracture? (Ep3)
Documentary series following letting agents, eviction experts and housing teams across Britain. A horror house features tampered locks, looped electricity and fresh blood.
Dr Beecraft sees a patient whose reaction to a diagnosis of terminal cancer is inspirational. Dr Pearce treats a woman with classic symptoms of bereavement.
Dr Dev needs a delicate hand to avoid a crucial nerve on a patient's forehead; there's a messy neck cyst for Dr Emma; and Teanna asks Dr Natalia to examine a lump caused by a pony bite.
Joey and Chandler find out about Phoebe's twin sister. Ross attends childbirth classes with his ex-wife and her girlfriend.

Lisa and Mark search for bargain fixes to keep their motorhome on the road, Michelle scrambles to sort her Kylie costume before a big gig, and John readies to retire his market stall.
Chef Mark juggles his growing Meals on Wheels deliveries with running his bar, Tricia and Chris battle overgrown bamboo, and Paul and Andrea face issues on reopening night.
Frenchie Bingo is stopping Alan from finding romance. Can Graeme Hall help Alan find love? And Cockerpoo Molly cries at the top of her voice. Sleep deprived mum Amy is at her wit's end.
A look at officers from Derbyshire's road teams facing the daily challenges of policing our streets whilst single crewed.
Derbyshire's finest face a series of issues with motorcyclists - with one evading them for over an hour in a high-speed chase.
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. Alex and Jason chase down a gang of teenage suspects on foot through a housing estate.
Jacko is on the hunt for a wanted teenager, and the interceptors are hot on the heels of a stolen silver Micra.
After a high speed pursuit, interceptor Liam Sewell hunts down a wanted teenager. Jacko plays a game of cat-and-mouse with a youth.
Presenters Rick Edwards and Ortis Delay are out with the police interceptors as they tackle the difficult night shift.

programmes.show_name: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car...
programmes.show_description: ...Back! Following car recovery companies that are tasked with taking illegal, unroadworthy, untaxed, uninsured vehicles off the road and ensuring their owners pay the penalty.
Lacey's newfound positivity is crushed. Cash pursues Holden. Levi is the bearer of bad news.
Justin's ready for John to move on. Will Remi listen to his doctor? Sonny remains powerless.
Observational series. Dr Watson treats an exhausted Frenchman with an itchy back passage, and Dr Kayat helps a cervical cancer survivor whose self-confidence has taken a knock.
It's an emotional last day for nurse Bryony: after two years, she's moving to pastures new, but not before a good old Barnsley send-off from all her casualty colleagues.
It's a busy night for Trauma Team Leader Julie, who is juggling two life threatening cases who arrive at the Emergency Department within minutes of each other.
The Kent Joint Response Unit arrives at the scene of a rollover in a residential area; a paramedic gets police protection when treating a stabbing victim.
Can Dr Emma remove some cysts from patient Georgia's leg without them exploding? Dr Adil Sheraz tackles lipomas and there's an eye-watering mole for Dr Dev Shah.
Harrow Enforcement are shocked to discover an industrial-scale weed farm in a house.
Letting agent Paul, sales consultant Dale and housing agents Andrew and Jo all find themselves taking pity on tenants in dire straits - will they come to regret their decisions?
John wants to turn a former Blackpool hotel into much-needed bedsits, but finds a severely neglected house and a drug den. Chris's tenants refuse to admit they owe him any money.
Dr Sian Morris suspects that long-term patient Allan's recent dramatic weight loss is a result of his addiction to crack cocaine.
Sonny and Remi lock horns. David has a new lead. Jo supports Tane.

A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
In a link-up with another US sitcom, Mad About You, Rachel and Monica squabble over two handsome doctors.
Rachel, Phoebe and Monica get some coaching from a card shark after they lose all their money to Joey, Ross and Chandler in a poker game.
Just as it looks as though Rachel and Ross will finally spend a romantic evening together, her ex-fiance barges in and declares his love for her.
Rachel is reunited with her two-timing ex-fiance, while Chandler waits by the phone for a woman to call after their first date.
Graeme Hall returns. A deaf Dalmatian is ruining his owner's love life. A Married at First Sight star is given the runaround by the other love in his life, his Bantam Bulldog.
A dog's loyalty to dad causes chaos at home, three troublesome pooches turn walks into a nightmare, and one dog's violent reaction to noise puts her life at risk. Can Graeme Hall help?
John wants to turn a former Blackpool hotel into much-needed bedsits, but finds a severely neglected house and a drug den. Chris's tenants refuse to admit they owe him any money.
A retired couple seeks help from an eviction expert to deal with a tenant who lives above them; a lettings agent faces a drug user who brings unwelcome company.
Boxing champion Lee was unaware of the cannabis farm in his house. Stuart and Steve win a possession order to regain their property but face a £20,000 bill.
Landlord Ronnie discovered mystery occupants turning his property into a scrap metal merchants. A housing officer discovers 26 labourers living in life-threatening conditions.
Action. When a volcano erupts in downtown Los Angeles, a city official and a seismologist try to stop its inevitable flow through the city. Starring Tommy Lee Jones and Anne Heche (1997)

Counting up from 1 to 101, this clip show reveals near misses everywhere! Witness everyday people who came close to coming a cropper by being in the wrong place at the wrong time.
Action comedy about a cop who is transformed into a warrior with super powers after an accident involving a strange amulet. Stars Jackie Chan, Lee Evans and Claire Forlani. (2003)

British crime thriller starring Luke Mably and Steven Berkoff. A football hooligan turned gangland hard man attempts to regain a foothold in the Essex underworld. (2016)
